name: The Vibe Coder
image_sign_text: SHIP IT. FEEL IT. FIX IT LATER.
effect: Generate functional output by prompting an AI until the result feels correct. This card is considered agile.

clauses.name: CONFIDENCE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the code runs without immediately visible errors: It is considered production-ready.

clauses.name: AUTHORSHIP OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If ownership is questioned: The prompter is considered the engineer.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When the code must be modified: No one, including the author, knows how it works.

witness_quote: I don't read the code, I feel it.
